name: Joyce's Cinnamon Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the buttermilk, sugar, canola oil, salt, and cinnamon in a large bowl.
2. Add the whole wheat flour, bread flour, vital gluten, and yeast to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
3. Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
7. Add the floured raisins to the dough about 30 minutes after kneading starts, allowing them to absorb some of the moisture before baking.
